case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,080.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
FILING FEES (6103.5 GOV. CODE) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
